title: zanthoxylum rhoifolium var. pubescens
intro: Zanthoxylum rhoifolium var. pubescens, a variety of the Zanthoxylum rhoifolium plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the prickly ash. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum rhoifolium var. pubescens include its ability to relieve pain and reduce fever, as well as its potential to protect against certain diseases and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
